gitignore_coverage.note: .gitignore omits src-tauri/target/ — Rust build artifacts not excluded. Not a secrets risk but a repo hygiene issue.

token_references: All 'token' references are usage metrics (input_tokens, output_tokens) — not auth tokens

csp_null_finding.impact: No CSP means malicious content in LLM output (if DOMPurify bypassed or bypassed path exists) can load external resources or execute scripts

shell_args_true.finding: shell:allow-spawn for claude, sh, python3 all use args: true — any string can be passed as argument from webview JS. If an attacker controls input to a spawn call, arbitrary command injection is possible.

overall_score: MEDIUM — no secrets found but missing CSP + unrestricted shell args are significant attack surface
